string.text:
The RSh-12 is a Russian heavy-duty revolver designed for close-quarters combat, notable for its massive size and firepower. Chambered in 12.7?55mm, it fires powerful subsonic rounds typically used in specialized rifles, giving it extreme stopping power. The revolver features a unique bottom-cylinder firing mechanism to reduce muzzle rise and improve control, and is constructed with a top-mounted Picatinny rail for optics or accessories. Though not widely issued, the RSh-12 stands out as one of the most formidable handguns ever developed.

 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: Most optics for the Picatinny/weaver system except low mount optics.
